text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Top Road, happy birthday! To celebrate, I've prepared an abridged performance of my encounter with you from the opera Legend of the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto and I also have a celebratory song 
to sing! The performance will be later today 
at the outdoor stage!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Umm… So sorry! My friends are actually 
throwing me a birthday party today…

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! Of c-c-course! Why wouldn't you be 
busy on your birthday? S-S-S-Sorryyyy!!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh! If you'd like, why don't you come 
to my birthday party?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Then you could sing your song there. 
I'd really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! Excellent idea! My mellifluous voice 
shall reach that many more pairs of ears!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-Are you sure we wouldn't be imposing?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to have you there! The party's sure 
to be a good time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
And as for your opera, would you be open 
to doing it another day?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'll go ahead and book the stage then!
